checks.name: Application initializes
No initial page errors
No horizontal overflow
Initial visible controls have accessible names
Document IDs are unique
Four-step home guide is visible
Full player guide has four clear steps
Kid guide explains ordinary Self-KO
checks.detail:
PLAYER GUIDE

How to use X Deck Lab
×
1
Add your parts

Open Parts. Browse official releases by date, including sets and part packs. Releases with no Beyblade performance parts are excluded.

2
Build a deck

Open Decks. Choose three Beys, or let the app suggest legal decks from your parts.

3
Run the next test

Open Test. Tap the first card. Build the shown opponent, battle once, and save the result.

4
Check readiness

Open Coach. It gives you one next mission, shows progress, and explains what
